You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A large green globe artichoke rests on a beige countertop beside a cartoon illustration and green text reading "HOW TO COOK AND EAT AN ARTICHOKE." [2-6] A woman with wavy brown hair wearing a patterned cardigan holds a small artichoke in a kitchen. Green text overlays appear: "HIGH IN FIBER" on the left and "HIGH IN ANTIOXIDANTS" on the right. She smiles while holding the vegetable. [6-10] The scene cuts to a colorful kaleidoscopic graphic with floral patterns, revealing the title "LORA'S VEGETARIAN COOKING" in white text with pink outlines. [10-14] The video returns to the woman holding the artichoke and a silver tool. New green text appears on the right reading "REMOVE STEM AND EXCESS LEAVES." [16-22] Hands stabilize a green artichoke on a beige board while a black-handled knife slices through the stem. The stacked green text "CUT STEM AND REMOVE EXCESS LEAVES" stays fixed on the right as the cutting motion progresses deeper until the stem is severed, leaving a small green piece on the board. [22-26] Hands hold the green artichoke over the beige board where the black knife and severed stem piece rest stationary. The left hand reaches toward the base, pulling away small

From 132s to 140s, a person wearing a black and white patterned top holds a detached green artichoke leaf in their left hand, displaying the fleshy base. The remaining whole cooked artichoke rests on a white paper towel on the counter. The person moves the leaf towards a white ceramic bowl situated on the left side. They dip the fleshy base of the leaf into the bowl and lift it slightly while holding it between their fingers. The whole artichoke remains on the white paper towel nearby as the person prepares to consume the leaf.

[74-76] A close-up shows a white bowl with butter as a hand holds a spoon of minced garlic above it near a jar, with text 'ADD GARLIC TO DIPPING SAUCE'. [140-146] A woman in a black and white patterned top stands in a kitchen with wooden cabinets and a black oven. She lifts a green artichoke leaf to her mouth, scrapes the fleshy base with her teeth, and pulls it away. She holds the leaf up while looking at the camera and speaking.

[148-150] The woman in the patterned blouse holds the scraped leaf in her right hand and looks down at the counter, shifting attention from the camera to the preparation area where her left hand rests near the green artichoke on the white paper towel. [150-152] She lowers her right hand and places both hands near the artichoke, positioning fingers around the base as if preparing to remove another leaf from the cooked vegetable. [152-154] Looking down, she places both hands on the green artichoke to hold it steady, keeping her gaze fixed on the food item. [154-156] She lifts her gaze to the camera, opens her mouth to speak, and lifts her hands slightly away to gesture with open palms near her waist while the artichoke remains on the paper towel.

[156-158] A woman in a black and white patterned top shifts her gaze to a green artichoke on a white paper towel, placing her hands on the vegetable. [158-160] A close-up shows hands pulling a lower green leaf outward from the artichoke while the right hand stabilizes the base. [160-162] The camera cuts to the woman holding the detached leaf in her right hand near a white bowl. [162-164] She dips the green leaf into the white bowl, with a close-up showing the leaf submerging into a yellow liquid inside the ceramic bowl next to a paper towel.

recent_thinks: [14-16] The text overlay vanishes, and the shot changes to a close-up of hands using a black-handled knife to cut the artichoke stem on a beige board. New green text appears on the right reading "CUT STEM AND REMOVE EXCESS LEAVES" in stacked capital letters.

[28-30] Hands hold a green artichoke upright. The left hand moves black kitchen shears closer to the tip of the top leaves. Green text reading 'CUT THORNY LEAVES' remains on the right. Cut stem fragments rest on the beige cutting board below the vegetable.

[42-44] A close-up view captures a large black pot sitting on a metal grate. Blue gas flames ignite underneath the pot, heating it up. The black glass stovetop surface surrounds the burner area where the fire is now active.

[146-148] A woman in a black and white patterned top holds a scraped green artichoke leaf in her right hand. She looks directly at the camera and speaks, standing in a kitchen with wooden cabinets and a black oven visible in the background behind her.

[164-166] A hand dips a green artichoke leaf into a white bowl containing yellow liquid. The view cuts to a woman in a patterned top holding the leaf, followed by a close-up of her placing the leaf in her mouth to scrape the flesh.

[166-168] A black screen appears with bright green text centered between two illustrated green artichokes at the bottom. The text states artichokes are rich in anti-oxidants, potassium, vitamin C, folate, magnesium, dietary fiber and have no fat, attributed to -ARTICHOKES.ORG.

She smiles while holding the vegetable. [6-10] The scene cuts to a colorful kaleidoscopic graphic with floral patterns, revealing the title "LORA'S VEGETARIAN COOKING" in white text with pink outlines. [10-14] The video returns to the woman holding the artichoke and a silver tool. New green text appears on the right reading "REMOVE STEM AND EXCESS LEAVES." [16-22] Hands stabilize a green artichoke on a beige board while a black-handled knife slices through the stem. The stacked green text "CUT STEM AND REMOVE EXCESS LEAVES" stays fixed on the right as the cutting motion progresses deeper until the stem is severed, leaving a small green piece on the board. [22-26] Hands hold the green artichoke over the beige board where the black knife and severed stem piece rest stationary. The left hand reaches toward the base, pulling away small

[116-118] Green instructional text disappears from the tiled backsplash. The woman lifts her gaze to smile at the camera, holding silver tongs in her left hand and gesturing with her open right hand. The cooked green vegetable remains stationary on the white paper towel. [118-124] The view cuts to a close-up of hands holding a single green artichoke leaf vertically. The left index finger points to the fleshy base of the leaf held by the right hand. Below, a whole cooked artichoke rests on a white paper towel near a white bowl. The hands maintain this steady demonstration pose with minimal movement.

[124-128] The view cuts to a whole green artichoke resting on a white paper towel. A right hand touches the top leaves while a left index finger points toward the center, then shifts to a broader gesture near the vegetable. [128-132] The left hand grasps a lower leaf on the side of the artichoke and pulls it outward and upward to separate it from the main body. The right hand stabilizes the vegetable on the surface. Finally, the left hand holds the single detached green leaf up while the right hand continues to steady the remaining artichoke.

From 132s to 140s, a person wearing a black and white patterned top holds a detached green artichoke leaf in their left hand, displaying the fleshy base. The remaining whole cooked artichoke rests on a white paper towel on the counter. The person moves the leaf towards a white ceramic bowl situated on the left side. They dip the fleshy base of the leaf into the bowl and lift it slightly while holding it between their fingers. The whole artichoke remains on the white paper towel nearby as the person prepares to consume the leaf.

[74-76] A close-up shows a white bowl with butter as a hand holds a spoon of minced garlic above it near a jar, with text 'ADD GARLIC TO DIPPING SAUCE'. [140-146] A woman in a black and white patterned top stands in a kitchen with wooden cabinets and a black oven. She lifts a green artichoke leaf to her mouth, scrapes the fleshy base with her teeth, and pulls it away. She holds the leaf up while looking at the camera and speaking.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

[6-10] The scene cuts to a colorful kaleidoscopic graphic with floral patterns, revealing the title "LORA'S VEGETARIAN COOKING" in white text with pink outlines. [10-14] The video returns to the woman holding the artichoke and a silver tool. New green text appears on the right reading "REMOVE STEM AND EXCESS LEAVES." [16-22] Hands stabilize a green artichoke on a beige board while a black-handled knife slices through the stem. [56-60] A cross-dissolve transitions to a close-up of the stovetop where a hand lifts the glass lid from the black pot, revealing green artichokes submerged in water while bright green text appears on the right reading "LET COOK FOR 15 MINS". [60-64] The scene dissolves back to the woman, who is now holding a white tub and a spoon containing white dip, as bright green text overlays appear on the right side reading "MAKE DIPPING SAUCE" above "ADD ORGANIC BUTTER".

[64-72] A woman with wavy brown hair wearing a black and white patterned blouse stands in a kitchen featuring wooden cabinets and a microwave. She holds a white tub in one hand and a spoon with a white substance in the other. Bright green text overlay on the right reads "MAKE DIPPING SAUCE" and "ADD ORGANIC BUTTER". The view shifts to reveal the counter surface, showing a wooden cutting board and black kitchen shears on the left.

[76-82] In a close-up, a white bowl containing a dollop of yellow butter sits on a counter next to a tub of Earth Balance. The spoon tilts, dropping the garlic onto the butter, accompanied by green text on the right reading "ADD GARLIC TO DIPPING SAUCE". [82-84] The scene dissolves to a medium shot of a woman holding the white bowl near a stainless steel microwave, her left hand on the door handle. [84-88] A woman stands beside a stainless steel microwave, holding a white bowl with yellow contents in her right hand while her left hand rests on the microwave door handle. Bright green text on the left reads "HEAT UP DIPPING SAUCE". The scene begins a cross-dissolve transition, making the woman and kitchen background appear semi-transparent.
